summary: Parameterized all three NaturalDeduction files (FromHilbert, HilbertDerivedRules, Equivalence) over generic Axioms with explicit K/S/EFQ parameters. Split HilbertDerivedRules into intuitionistic and classical layers. Added generic hilbert_iff_nd with IntPropAxiom and PropositionalAxiom corollaries. Fixed stale docstring in Derivation.lean. Full build passes, zero sorries, zero new axioms.
